title: stoibrax capense
intro: Stoibrax capense is a plant species native to southern Africa, also known as the "Wild Almond" or "Mopane Almond", belonging to the Sapindaceae family. Traditionally, Stoibrax capense has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Stoibrax capense can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
intro_study: According to "Zhong yao cai = Zhongyaocai = Journal of Chinese medicinal materials", stoibrax capense has benefits that include inhibiting thrombosis in vivo, reducing blood viscosity and hematocrit, and decreasing platelet aggregation.
